title: Senior Business Development Manager at Embassy Group Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Senior Business Development Manager at Embassy Group Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
We at Embassy Group Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Business Development Manager based out of Ranchi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Embassy Group Digital Technologies:
Embassy Group Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group Digital Technologies!
